falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes above 5,200 (a 15% increase from current levels) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sustained price breakout would contradict the blowoff pattern and suggest strong bullish momentum, invalidating the 'UNKNOWN' verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: The 20-day moving average crosses above the 50-day moving average on high volume
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This technical bullish crossover would indicate a shift in trend momentum, directly refuting the current HOLD signal and pattern similarity to a bottom.

falsification_conditions.condition: The VIX volatility index drops below 12 (its 2024 low) for 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such extreme complacency in volatility would contradict the blowoff score's implication of impending market stress, falsifying the current uncertainty.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
